context: Tests whether the agent uses atomic SQL increment updates for conversion events, correctly separates add_to_cart from purchase tracking, stores revenue in cents, and persists the experiment variant ID in each order record for later reconciliation.

checklist.name: Atomic add_to_cart increment
checklist.description: trackExperimentEvent uses a SQL UPDATE with 'add_to_carts = add_to_carts + 1' for the add_to_cart event — not a read-modify-write pattern

checklist.name: Atomic purchase increment
checklist.description: trackExperimentEvent uses a SQL UPDATE with 'purchases = purchases + 1' for the purchase event — not a read-modify-write pattern

checklist.name: Revenue atomic increment
checklist.description: trackExperimentEvent updates revenue using 'revenue = revenue + ?' in the same UPDATE statement as the purchase count

checklist.name: Revenue in cents
checklist.description: The revenueCents parameter or revenue amounts are treated as integer cents throughout — no conversion to/from dollars inside the tracking function

checklist.name: Separate event handling
checklist.description: add_to_cart and purchase are handled as distinct branches (e.g., if/else or switch) — purchase does NOT also update add_to_carts

checklist.name: Variant ID in order
checklist.description: recordOrder or checkoutIntegration persists the variantId into the order record (not just logged or discarded)

checklist.name: Experiment ID in order
checklist.description: recordOrder or checkoutIntegration also persists the experimentId alongside variantId in the order record

checklist.name: Null variant handled
checklist.description: The integration handles the case where variantId is null (session not in any experiment) without error — orders still complete normally

checklist.name: Impression before event
checklist.description: checkoutIntegration shows that the impression is recorded when the price is first shown (via getExperimentPrice), before any add_to_cart or purchase event

checklist.name: Integration notes completeness
checklist.description: INTEGRATION_NOTES.md mentions storing variant ID in orders AND using atomic increments (not read-modify-write) as key requirements

checklist.name: No double counting
checklist.description: The checkout flow does not call trackExperimentEvent for purchase AND also increment add_to_carts again at checkout time — each event type is tracked exactly once
